summary: Video. A subtitled clip of a CNN interview shows Barack Obama answering a question about unemployment among African-Americans, with word-by-word caption overlays referencing a 'pathway to' citizenship and worker conditions. It is archival news footage with no music or audio track and no added visual effects.
notable_text: NOW THERE IS; WORKER CONDITIONS; CONTINUE TO; WHO THEY ARE; PATHWAY TO; QUESTION: HOW WOULD YOU ADDRESS UNEMPLOYMENT FOR AFRICAN-AMERICANS RELATED...
